offer: For logistics dispatchers managing 10-20 drivers, manual tracking of hours-of-service causes compliance issues that lead to penalties. We automate tracking instead of manual tracking of driver logs.
problem: Ensuring compliance with hours-of-service regulations to avoid penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics dispatchers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on compliance tools
DM outreach to logistics dispatchers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for dispatchers
try_it: Let users try log entry tracking and violation flagging on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
